insight_text: Region Warsaw shows the highest average latency during peak hours.
Warsaw has the highest average drop rate in the dataset.
3 regions are repeatedly at high risk due to congestion and weak signal: Lodz, Krakow, Katowice.
4G sites show the higher anomaly rate and should be reviewed for capacity balancing.
Gdansk recorded the most outages and may need infrastructure resilience checks.
Poznan currently has the strongest overall service quality score.
5G delivers the better average service quality score across the network.
Katowice shows the sharpest recent decline in service quality compared with the previous week.
